title: YO15 3QY, Dunbia (UK): environmental permit issued – EPR/LP3830BC/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Dunbia (UK)   Installation name: Dunbia Carnaby   Permit number: EPR/LP3830BC/V004   "
